# ==================== START OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_134136_fixed.py ====================
гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒӢгӮүиҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҜз„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж–Үеӯ— 'гҖҒ' (U+3001) гҒ«гӮҲгӮӢгӮӮгҒ®гҒ§гҖҒгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜPythonгҒҢзҗҶи§ЈгҒ§гҒҚгҒӘгҒ„ж–Үеӯ—гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҜгҖҒйҖҡеёёгҖҒйқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒҢгӮігғјгғүеҶ…гҒ«еҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢе ҙеҗҲгҒ«зҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒҜгғҮгғ•гӮ©гғ«гғҲгҒ§ASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒ®гҒҝгӮ’гӮөгғқгғјгғҲгҒ—гҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒгҒқгҒ®д»–гҒ®ж–Үеӯ—гӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгҒҜгҖҒгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®е…Ҳй ӯгҒ«зү№е®ҡгҒ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’жҢҮе®ҡгҒҷгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒҜгҖҒPythonгӮігғјгғүгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰи§ЈйҮҲгҒ§гҒҚгҒӘгҒ„ж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«зҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢй«ҳгҒ„гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒҜ '#' иЁҳеҸ·гҒ§е§ӢгҒҫгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҒЈгҒҰгҖҒе…ғгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒ«гҒҜе®ҹйҡӣгҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҜгҒӘгҒҸгҖҒгӮігғЎгғігғҲгӮ’жӯЈгҒ—гҒҸгғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғғгғҲгҒҷгӮҢгҒ°е•ҸйЎҢгҒҜи§ЈжұәгҒҷгӮӢгҒҜгҒҡгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

дҝ®жӯЈеҫҢгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҒ§гҒҷпјҡ

```python
# д»ҘдёӢгҒҜгҖҒpytestеҪўејҸгҒ®гғҰгғӢгғғгғҲгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒ®дёҖдҫӢгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ
def add(a, b):
    return a + b
```

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒҜunittestгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ’е®ҹиЎҢгҒ—гӮҲгҒҶгҒЁгҒ—гҒҹгҒЁгҒҚгҒ«зҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒқгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒе®ҹйҡӣгҒ«гҒҜгҖҒгҒ“гҒ®й–ўж•°гӮ’гғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®йҒ©еҲҮгҒӘгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮұгғјгӮ№гҒҢеҝ…иҰҒгҒ«гҒӘгӮӢгҒ§гҒ—гӮҮгҒҶгҖӮ
# ====================== END OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_134136_fixed.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_134145_original.py ====================
гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒӢгӮүиҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҜз„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж–Үеӯ— 'гҖҒ' (U+3001) гҒ«гӮҲгӮӢгӮӮгҒ®гҒ§гҖҒгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜPythonгҒҢзҗҶи§ЈгҒ§гҒҚгҒӘгҒ„ж–Үеӯ—гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҜгҖҒйҖҡеёёгҖҒйқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒҢгӮігғјгғүеҶ…гҒ«еҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢе ҙеҗҲгҒ«зҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒҜгғҮгғ•гӮ©гғ«гғҲгҒ§ASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒ®гҒҝгӮ’гӮөгғқгғјгғҲгҒ—гҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒгҒқгҒ®д»–гҒ®ж–Үеӯ—гӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгҒҜгҖҒгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®е…Ҳй ӯгҒ«зү№е®ҡгҒ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’жҢҮе®ҡгҒҷгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒҜгҖҒPythonгӮігғјгғүгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰи§ЈйҮҲгҒ§гҒҚгҒӘгҒ„ж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«зҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢй«ҳгҒ„гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒҜ '#' иЁҳеҸ·гҒ§е§ӢгҒҫгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҒЈгҒҰгҖҒе…ғгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒ«гҒҜе®ҹйҡӣгҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҜгҒӘгҒҸгҖҒгӮігғЎгғігғҲгӮ’жӯЈгҒ—гҒҸгғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғғгғҲгҒҷгӮҢгҒ°е•ҸйЎҢгҒҜи§ЈжұәгҒҷгӮӢгҒҜгҒҡгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

дҝ®жӯЈеҫҢгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҒ§гҒҷпјҡ

```python
# д»ҘдёӢгҒҜгҖҒpytestеҪўејҸгҒ®гғҰгғӢгғғгғҲгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒ®дёҖдҫӢгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ
def add(a, b):
    return a + b
```

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒҜunittestгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ’е®ҹиЎҢгҒ—гӮҲгҒҶгҒЁгҒ—гҒҹгҒЁгҒҚгҒ«зҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒқгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒе®ҹйҡӣгҒ«гҒҜгҖҒгҒ“гҒ®й–ўж•°гӮ’гғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®йҒ©еҲҮгҒӘгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮұгғјгӮ№гҒҢеҝ…иҰҒгҒ«гҒӘгӮӢгҒ§гҒ—гӮҮгҒҶгҖӮ
# ====================== END OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_134145_original.py ======================

гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒӢгӮүиҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒе•ҸйЎҢгҒҜPythonгӮігғјгғүгҒ§гҒҜгҒӘгҒҸгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгҒ«гҒӮгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒҜгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгҒ®1иЎҢзӣ®гҒ«з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж–Үеӯ—гҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгҒЁжҢҮж‘ҳгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒPythonгҒҢASCIIд»ҘеӨ–гҒ®ж–Үеӯ—гӮ’иӘҚиӯҳгҒ§гҒҚгҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒжҸҗдҫӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжғ…е ұгҒӢгӮүгҒҜгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгҒ®еҶ…е®№гӮ’зўәиӘҚгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҜгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮгҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҒЈгҒҰгҖҒе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒӘдҝ®жӯЈж–№жі•гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҜгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒдёҖиҲ¬зҡ„гҒӘгӮўгғүгғҗгӮӨгӮ№гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰгҒҜгҖҒPythonгӮігғјгғүгӮ„гғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгҒ«йқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—пјҲж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒӘгҒ©пјүгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгҒҜгҖҒгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®е…Ҳй ӯгҒ«ж–Үеӯ—гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’жҢҮе®ҡгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’гҒҠеӢ§гӮҒгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒPythonгҒҢгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®ж–Үеӯ—гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’жӯЈгҒ—гҒҸиӘҚиӯҳгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«еҝ…иҰҒгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

д»ҘдёӢгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«гҖҒгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®е…Ҳй ӯгҒ«ж–Үеӯ—гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’жҢҮе®ҡгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷпјҡ

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
```

гҒ“гҒ®иЎҢгӮ’иҝҪеҠ гҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒPythonгҒҜгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒҢUTF-8гҒ§гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғүгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’иӘҚиӯҳгҒ—гҖҒйқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гӮ’жӯЈгҒ—гҒҸеҮҰзҗҶгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®дҝ®жӯЈгҒҢе•ҸйЎҢгӮ’и§ЈжұәгҒҷгӮӢгҒӢгҒ©гҒҶгҒӢгҒҜгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгҒ®д»–гҒ®йғЁеҲҶгҒ«гҒ©гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘеҶ…е®№гҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒӢгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
```

гҒ“гҒ®иЎҢгӮ’иҝҪеҠ гҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒPythonгҒҜгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒҢUTF-8гҒ§гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғүгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’иӘҚиӯҳгҒ—гҖҒйқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гӮ’жӯЈгҒ—гҒҸеҮҰзҗҶгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

# ==================== START OF: exported_projects\app_20250703_223016\app\utils\pricing_calculator.py ====================
# app/utils/pricing_calculator.py

def calculate_profit(purchase_price, selling_price, shipping_cost=0, fee_rate=0.15):
    """
    е•Ҷе“ҒгҒ®еҲ©зӣҠгӮ’иЁҲз®—гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
    :param purchase_price: д»•е…ҘдҫЎж ј
    :param selling_price: иІ©еЈІдҫЎж ј
    :param shipping_cost: жғіе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгӮӢзҷәйҖҒиІ»з”Ё (еӣәе®ҡеҖӨгҒҫгҒҹгҒҜеӢ•зҡ„гҒ«иЁҲз®—)
    :param fee_rate: иІ©еЈІгғ—гғ©гғғгғҲгғ•гӮ©гғјгғ гҒ®жүӢж•°ж–ҷзҺҮ (дҫӢ: BUYMAгҒ®15%)
    :return: еҲ©зӣҠ
    """
    fees = selling_price * fee_rate
    profit = selling_price - purchase_price - fees - shipping_cost
    return profit
# ====================== END OF: exported_projects\app_20250703_223016\app\utils\pricing_calculator.py ======================

def calculate_profit(purchase_price, selling_price, shipping_cost=0, fee_rate=0.15):
    """
    е•Ҷе“ҒгҒ®еҲ©зӣҠгӮ’иЁҲз®—гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
    :param purchase_price: д»•е…ҘдҫЎж ј
    :param selling_price: иІ©еЈІдҫЎж ј
    :param shipping_cost: жғіе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгӮӢзҷәйҖҒиІ»з”Ё (еӣәе®ҡеҖӨгҒҫгҒҹгҒҜеӢ•зҡ„гҒ«иЁҲз®—)
    :param fee_rate: иІ©еЈІгғ—гғ©гғғгғҲгғ•гӮ©гғјгғ гҒ®жүӢж•°ж–ҷзҺҮ (дҫӢ: BUYMAгҒ®15%)
    :return: еҲ©зӣҠ
    """
    fees = selling_price * fee_rate
    profit = selling_price - purchase_price - fees - shipping_cost
    return profit

def calculate_profit(purchase_price, selling_price, shipping_cost=0, fee_rate=0.15):
    """
    е•Ҷе“ҒгҒ®еҲ©зӣҠгӮ’иЁҲз®—гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

    :param fee_rate: иІ©еЈІгғ—гғ©гғғгғҲгғ•гӮ©гғјгғ гҒ®жүӢж•°ж–ҷзҺҮ (дҫӢ: BUYMAгҒ®15%)
    :return: еҲ©зӣҠ
    """
    fees = selling_price * fee_rate
    profit = selling_price - purchase_price - fees - shipping_cost
    return profit

# ==================== START OF: quality_gate_test_sandbox\app\calculator.py ====================
def add_two_numbers(a: int, b: int) -> int:
    """
    Create a function 'add' that takes two integers 'a' and 'b' and returns their sum.
    """
    return a + b


def test_add_two_numbers():
    """Test cases for add_two_numbers function."""
    assert add_two_numbers(2, 3) == 5
    assert add_two_numbers(-2, 3) == 1
    assert add_two_numbers(2, -3) == -1
    assert add_two_numbers(0, 0) == 0
    assert add_two_numbers(100, 200) == 300
# ====================== END OF: quality_gate_test_sandbox\app\calculator.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: app\extensions.py ====================
from celery import Celery, Task

def celery_init_app(app):
    class ContextTask(Task):
        def __call__(self, *args, **kwargs):
            with app.app_context():
                return self.run(*args, **kwargs)

    celery = Celery(app.import_name)
    celery.config_from_object(app.config["CELERY"])
    celery.Task = ContextTask
    app.celery = celery            # вҶҗ еӨ–йғЁгҒӢгӮүеҸӮз…§гҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶдҝқжҢҒ
    return celery

# ====================== END OF: app\extensions.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\nexuscore\modules\diff_viewer.py ====================
# modules/diff_viewer.py

import difflib

def generate_diff(old_code: str, new_code: str) -> str:
    diff = difflib.unified_diff(
        old_code.splitlines(),
        new_code.splitlines(),
        fromfile='Before',
        tofile='After',
        lineterm=''
    )
    return "\n".join(diff)

# ====================== END OF: src\nexuscore\modules\diff_viewer.py ======================

    demo = tab_streamlit_port()
    demo.launch(
        server_name="127.0.0.1",
        server_port=7860,
        share=False,
        debug=True
    )

гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒ®еҶ…е®№гҒӢгӮүиҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒ§гҒҜгҒӘгҒҸгҖҒгӮігғЎгғігғҲйғЁеҲҶгҒ«йқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—пјҲж—Ҙжң¬иӘһпјүгҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢеҺҹеӣ гҒ§SyntaxErrorгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒҜеҹәжң¬зҡ„гҒ«ASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒ®гҒҝгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒ№гҒҚгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҫгҒҹгҖҒй–ўж•°гҒ®еҶ…е®№иҮӘдҪ“гӮӮй–“йҒ•гҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮaddгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶй–ўж•°еҗҚгҒӢгӮүжҺЁжё¬гҒҷгӮӢгҒ«гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®й–ўж•°гҒҜ2гҒӨгҒ®ж•°еҖӨгӮ’еҠ з®—гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢжңҹеҫ…гҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҒҢгҖҒзҸҫеңЁгҒ®е®ҹиЈ…гҒ§гҒҜеј•гҒҚз®—гӮ’иЎҢгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒ“гӮҢгӮүгҒ®е•ҸйЎҢгӮ’дҝ®жӯЈгҒ—гҒҹгӮігғјгғүгҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

```python
def add(a, b):
    return a + b  # Corrected from subtraction to addition
```

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒ«гҒҜгғҰгғӢгғғгғҲгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒ®е®ҹиЎҢгҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢжғ…е ұгӮӮеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®жғ…е ұгҒӢгӮүжҺЁжё¬гҒҷгӮӢгҒ«гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҜгғҰгғӢгғғгғҲгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒ®дёҖйғЁгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰе®ҹиЎҢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒқгҒ®е ҙеҗҲгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгӮӮеҗҢж§ҳгҒ«дҝ®жӯЈгҒҷгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒӘгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгҒҢзӨәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒгҒқгҒ®йғЁеҲҶгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгҒҜе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒӘдҝ®жӯЈжЎҲгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ
# ====================== END OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_125710_fixed.py ======================

гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒ®еҶ…е®№гҒӢгӮүиҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒ§гҒҜгҒӘгҒҸгҖҒгӮігғЎгғігғҲйғЁеҲҶгҒ«йқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—пјҲж—Ҙжң¬иӘһпјүгҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢеҺҹеӣ гҒ§SyntaxErrorгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒҜеҹәжң¬зҡ„гҒ«ASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒ®гҒҝгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒ№гҒҚгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҫгҒҹгҖҒй–ўж•°гҒ®еҶ…е®№иҮӘдҪ“гӮӮй–“йҒ•гҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮaddгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶй–ўж•°еҗҚгҒӢгӮүжҺЁжё¬гҒҷгӮӢгҒ«гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®й–ўж•°гҒҜ2гҒӨгҒ®ж•°еҖӨгӮ’еҠ з®—гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢжңҹеҫ…гҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҒҢгҖҒзҸҫеңЁгҒ®е®ҹиЈ…гҒ§гҒҜеј•гҒҚз®—гӮ’иЎҢгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒ“гӮҢгӮүгҒ®е•ҸйЎҢгӮ’дҝ®жӯЈгҒ—гҒҹгӮігғјгғүгҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

```python
def add(a, b):
    return a + b  # Corrected from subtraction to addition
```

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒ«гҒҜгғҰгғӢгғғгғҲгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒ®е®ҹиЎҢгҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢжғ…е ұгӮӮеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®жғ…е ұгҒӢгӮүжҺЁжё¬гҒҷгӮӢгҒ«гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҜгғҰгғӢгғғгғҲгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒ®дёҖйғЁгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰе®ҹиЎҢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒқгҒ®е ҙеҗҲгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгӮӮеҗҢж§ҳгҒ«дҝ®жӯЈгҒҷгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒӘгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгҒҢзӨәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒгҒқгҒ®йғЁеҲҶгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгҒҜе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒӘдҝ®жӯЈжЎҲгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ

# ==================== START OF: src\sandbox_output\test_sample.py ====================
import pytest
from sample import is_prime

def test_is_prime():
    assert is_prime(2) == True
    assert is_prime(3) == True
    assert is_prime(4) == False
    assert is_prime(5) == True
    assert is_prime(20) == False
    assert is_prime(23) == True
    assert is_prime(1) == False
    assert is_prime(-1) == False
# ====================== END OF: src\sandbox_output\test_sample.py ======================

гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҜPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүиҮӘдҪ“гҒ«е•ҸйЎҢгҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгӮҸгҒ‘гҒ§гҒҜгҒӘгҒҸгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгғўгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гҒ®гӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгҒ«еӨұж•—гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢеҺҹеӣ гҒЁгҒӘгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҒЈгҒҰгҖҒPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгӮ’дҝ®жӯЈгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§и§ЈжұәгҒҷгӮӢе•ҸйЎҢгҒ§гҒҜгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ

гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгӮ’иҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒ'C:\\Users\\USER\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\tmpjgrmw9nh\\test_main'гҒЁгҒ„гҒҶгғўгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гҒҢиҰӢгҒӨгҒӢгӮүгҒӘгҒ„гҒЁгҒ„гҒҶеҶ…е®№гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ’е®ҹиЎҢгҒҷгӮӢйҡӣгҒ«еҝ…иҰҒгҒӘгғўгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гҒҢйҒ©еҲҮгҒӘе ҙжүҖгҒ«еӯҳеңЁгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„гҖҒгҒҫгҒҹгҒҜйҒ©еҲҮгҒӘеҗҚеүҚгҒ§еӯҳеңЁгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„еҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

и§Јжұәзӯ–гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰгҒҜгҖҒд»ҘдёӢгҒ®гҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зўәиӘҚгҒ—гҒҰгҒҝгҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ

1. гғҶгӮ№гғҲгғўгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гҒҢжӯЈгҒ—гҒ„е ҙжүҖгҒ«еӯҳеңЁгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒӢзўәиӘҚгҒҷгӮӢгҖӮ
2. гғҶгӮ№гғҲгғўгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гҒ®еҗҚеүҚгҒҢжӯЈгҒ—гҒ„гҒӢзўәиӘҚгҒҷгӮӢгҖӮ
3. PythonгҒ®гғ‘гӮ№иЁӯе®ҡгҒҢжӯЈгҒ—гҒ„гҒӢзўәиӘҚгҒҷгӮӢгҖӮ

гҒ“гӮҢгӮүгӮ’зўәиӘҚгғ»дҝ®жӯЈгҒ—гҒҹдёҠгҒ§еҶҚеәҰгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ’е®ҹиЎҢгҒ—гҒҰгҒҝгҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ
# ====================== END OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_114552_fixed.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_124402_fixed.py ====================
е…ғгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒ«гҒҜдәҢгҒӨгҒ®е•ҸйЎҢгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮдёҖгҒӨгҒҜгҖҒй–ўж•°`add`гҒҢе®ҹйҡӣгҒ«гҒҜеј•ж•°гӮ’жёӣз®—гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҖҒгӮӮгҒҶдёҖгҒӨгҒҜгҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒӢгӮүиҰӢгҒҰгҖҒPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҢж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒ§е§ӢгҒҫгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒҜгғҮгғ•гӮ©гғ«гғҲгҒ§ASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒ—гҒӢеҸ—гҒ‘д»ҳгҒ‘гҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒҢеҺҹеӣ гҒ§гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

д»ҘдёӢгҒ«дҝ®жӯЈгҒ—гҒҹгӮігғјгғүгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷпјҡ

```python
# д»ҘдёӢгҒҜгҖҒжҢҮе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹPythonгӮігғјгғүгҒ«еҜҫгҒҷгӮӢpytestеҪўејҸгҒ®гғҰгғӢгғғгғҲгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ
def add(a, b):
    return a + b  # дҝ®жӯЈпјҡreturn a - bгҒӢгӮүreturn a + bгҒё
```

гҒ“гҒ®дҝ®жӯЈгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒй–ўж•°`add`гҒҜеј•ж•°гӮ’жӯЈгҒ—гҒҸеҠ з®—гҒ—гҖҒж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгӮӮASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒ«еӨүжҸӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢи§Јж¶ҲгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
# ====================== END OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_124402_fixed.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_124414_original.py ====================
е…ғгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒ«гҒҜдәҢгҒӨгҒ®е•ҸйЎҢгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮдёҖгҒӨгҒҜгҖҒй–ўж•°`add`гҒҢе®ҹйҡӣгҒ«гҒҜеј•ж•°гӮ’жёӣз®—гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҖҒгӮӮгҒҶдёҖгҒӨгҒҜгҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒӢгӮүиҰӢгҒҰгҖҒPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҢж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒ§е§ӢгҒҫгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒҜгғҮгғ•гӮ©гғ«гғҲгҒ§ASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒ—гҒӢеҸ—гҒ‘д»ҳгҒ‘гҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒҢеҺҹеӣ гҒ§гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

д»ҘдёӢгҒ«дҝ®жӯЈгҒ—гҒҹгӮігғјгғүгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷпјҡ

```python
# д»ҘдёӢгҒҜгҖҒжҢҮе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹPythonгӮігғјгғүгҒ«еҜҫгҒҷгӮӢpytestеҪўејҸгҒ®гғҰгғӢгғғгғҲгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ
def add(a, b):
    return a + b  # дҝ®жӯЈпјҡreturn a - bгҒӢгӮүreturn a + bгҒё
```

гҒ“гҒ®дҝ®жӯЈгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒй–ўж•°`add`гҒҜеј•ж•°гӮ’жӯЈгҒ—гҒҸеҠ з®—гҒ—гҖҒж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ®гӮігғЎгғігғҲгӮӮASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒ«еӨүжҸӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢи§Јж¶ҲгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

з”ігҒ—иЁігҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҒҢгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲеҜҫиұЎгҒ®PythonгӮігғјгғүгҒҢе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒ«жҸҗдҫӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒӘдҝ®жӯЈгӮігғјгғүгӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒӢгӮүжҺЁжё¬гҒҷгӮӢгҒ«гҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгҒ®е…Ҳй ӯгҒ«йқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—пјҲгҒ“гҒ®е ҙеҗҲгҒҜж—Ҙжң¬иӘһпјүгҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢе•ҸйЎҢгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

PythonгҒ®гӮҪгғјгӮ№гӮігғјгғүгҒ«йқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгҖҒгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®е…Ҳй ӯгҒ«ж–Үеӯ—гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’жҢҮе®ҡгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢдёҖиҲ¬зҡ„гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮд»ҘдёӢгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«гҖҒгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®е…Ҳй ӯгҒ«ж–Үеӯ—гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’жҢҮе®ҡгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷпјҡ

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
```

гҒ“гҒ®иЎҢгӮ’иҝҪеҠ гҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒPythonгҒҜгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒҢUTF-8гҒ§гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғүгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’иӘҚиӯҳгҒ—гҖҒйқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гӮ’жӯЈгҒ—гҒҸеҮҰзҗҶгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®дҝ®жӯЈгҒҢе•ҸйЎҢгӮ’и§ЈжұәгҒҷгӮӢгҒӢгҒ©гҒҶгҒӢгҒҜгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮігғјгғүгҒ®д»–гҒ®йғЁеҲҶгҒ«гҒ©гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘеҶ…е®№гҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒӢгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

from app.extensions import celery_init_app

# дҫӢпјҡгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜе®ҡзҫ©

def ping():
    print("pong")

# ==================== START OF: src\nexuscore\gradio_app\sandbox_output\sample.py ====================
# encoding: utf-8

def add_two_integers(a, b):
    """
    2гҒӨгҒ®ж•ҙж•°гӮ’еҠ з®—гҒ—гҒҰиҝ”гҒҷгҖӮ
    ж•ҙж•°д»ҘеӨ–гҒ®еһӢгҒҢдёҺгҒҲгӮүгӮҢгҒҹе ҙеҗҲгҒҜ ValueError гӮ’жҠ•гҒ’гӮӢгҖӮ
    """
    if not isinstance(a, int) or not isinstance(b, int):
        raise ValueError("е…ҘеҠӣгҒҜж•ҙж•°гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷ")
    return a + b

# ====================== END OF: src\nexuscore\gradio_app\sandbox_output\sample.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\nexuscore\gradio_app\sandbox_output\test_sample.py ====================
import pytest
from sample import max_profit

def test_max_profit():
    assert max_profit([7,1,5,3,6,4]) == 6  # вҶҗ ж„Ҹеӣізҡ„гҒ«иӘӨгҒЈгҒҹжңҹеҫ…еҖӨ
    assert max_profit([7,6,4,3,1]) == 0
    assert max_profit([]) == 0
    assert max_profit([1,2]) == 1
    assert max_profit([2,1]) == 0
    assert max_profit([3,2,6,5,0,3]) == 4

# ====================== END OF: src\nexuscore\gradio_app\sandbox_output\test_sample.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\nexuscore\modules\whisper_handler.py ====================
import whisper

model = whisper.load_model("small")

def transcribe_audio(audio_path: str) -> str:
    try:
        result = model.transcribe(audio_path)
        return result["text"]
    except Exception as e:
        return f"ж–Үеӯ—иө·гҒ“гҒ—дёӯгҒ«гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹ: {e}"

гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒ®еҶ…е®№гӮ’иҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҢж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ§жӣёгҒӢгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«SyntaxErrorгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҜиӢұиӘһгҒ§жӣёгҒҸеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҫгҒҹгҖҒй–ўж•°еҗҚгҒҢaddгҒӘгҒ®гҒ«гҖҒе®ҹйҡӣгҒ®еҮҰзҗҶгҒҢеј•гҒҚз®—гҒ«гҒӘгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ®гӮӮе•ҸйЎҢгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгӮ’еҠ з®—гҒ«дҝ®жӯЈгҒҷгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

дҝ®жӯЈеҫҢгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

```python
def add(a, b):
    return a + b
```

гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒ®еҶ…е®№гӮ’иҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҢж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ§жӣёгҒӢгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«SyntaxErrorгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҜиӢұиӘһгҒ§жӣёгҒҸеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҫгҒҹгҖҒй–ўж•°еҗҚгҒҢaddгҒӘгҒ®гҒ«гҖҒе®ҹйҡӣгҒ®еҮҰзҗҶгҒҢеј•гҒҚз®—гҒ«гҒӘгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ®гӮӮе•ҸйЎҢгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгӮ’еҠ з®—гҒ«дҝ®жӯЈгҒҷгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

дҝ®жӯЈеҫҢгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

```python
def add(a, b):
    return a + b
```

# ==================== START OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_124433_fixed.py ====================
```python
# This is a pytest-style unit test for the provided Python code.
def add(a, b):
    return a + b  # Fixed: changed from return a - b to return a + b
```
гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгӮ’иҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүеҶ…гҒ§з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж–Үеӯ—гҒҢдҪҝгӮҸгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢеҺҹеӣ гҒ§гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒ«гҒҜгҖҒж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒ®ж–Үеӯ—гҖҢгҖҒгҖҚгҒҢеҺҹеӣ гҒ§гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒжҸҗдҫӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮігғјгғүгҒ«гҒҜгҒқгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘж–Үеӯ—гҒҜеӯҳеңЁгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҹеҺҹеӣ гӮ’зү№е®ҡгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҜйӣЈгҒ—гҒ„гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒ«иЁҳијүгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гғ‘гӮ№гӮ’иҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҜгғҰгғјгӮ¶гғјгҒ®гғӯгғјгӮ«гғ«з’°еўғгҒ§зҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒқгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒгғҰгғјгӮ¶гғјгҒҢгғӯгғјгӮ«гғ«з’°еўғгҒ§дҪ•гҒӢгҒ—гӮүгҒ®ж“ҚдҪңгӮ’иЎҢгҒЈгҒҹзөҗжһңгҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҹеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

гҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҒЈгҒҰгҖҒжҸҗдҫӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮігғјгғүиҮӘдҪ“гҒ«гҒҜе•ҸйЎҢгҒҢгҒӘгҒ„гҒЁиҖғгҒҲгӮүгӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғҰгғјгӮ¶гғјгҒ«гҒҜгҖҒгғӯгғјгӮ«гғ«з’°еўғгҒ§гҒ®ж“ҚдҪңгӮ’иҰӢзӣҙгҒҷгҒӢгҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҹз’°еўғгҒ§гҒ®и©ізҙ°гҒӘжғ…е ұгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҰгӮӮгӮүгҒҶгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’гҒҠгҒҷгҒҷгӮҒгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
# ====================== END OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_124433_fixed.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_131857_fixed.py ====================
```python
def add(a, b):
    return a + b

def test_add():
    assert add(1, 2) == 3
    assert add(-1, 1) == 0
    assert add(0, 0) == 0
```
гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒӢгӮүгҖҒPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүеҶ…гҒ«з„ЎеҠ№гҒӘж–Үеӯ—пјҲ'гҖҒ'пјүгҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢеҺҹеӣ гҒЁжҺЁжё¬гҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒқгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒгҒқгҒ®йғЁеҲҶгӮ’еүҠйҷӨгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒе…ғгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒ«гҒҜгҖҢ# Corrected from subtraction to additionгҖҚгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶгӮігғЎгғігғҲгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҖҒгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜиӘӨи§ЈгӮ’жӢӣгҒҸеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒеүҠйҷӨгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ

з”ігҒ—иЁігҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҒҢгҖҒе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒӘPythonгӮігғјгғүгҒҢжҸҗдҫӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒдҝ®жӯЈжёҲгҒҝгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒӢгӮүжҺЁжё¬гҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒPythonгӮігғјгғүеҶ…гҒ«йқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—пјҲгҒ“гҒ®е ҙеҗҲгҒҜж—Ҙжң¬иӘһпјүгҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

PythonгҒҜASCIIж–Үеӯ—д»ҘеӨ–гӮӮгӮөгғқгғјгғҲгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҒҢгҖҒгҒқгҒ®е ҙеҗҲгҒҜгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®е…Ҳй ӯгҒ«ж–Үеӯ—гӮігғјгғүгӮ’зӨәгҒҷзү№еҲҘгҒӘгӮігғЎгғігғҲпјҲгғһгӮёгғғгӮҜгӮігғЎгғігғҲпјүгӮ’иЁҳиҝ°гҒҷгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮд»ҘдёӢгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«гҖҒгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®е…Ҳй ӯгҒ«`# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-`гӮ’иҝҪеҠ гҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒUTF-8гҒ§гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғүгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹйқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гӮ’еҗ«гӮҖPythonгӮігғјгғүгӮ’жӯЈгҒ—гҒҸи§ЈйҮҲгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
# гҒ“гҒ“гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒз°ЎеҚҳгҒӘPythonгҒ®й–ўж•°гҒЁгҒқгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®pytestеҪўејҸгҒ®гғҰгғӢгғғгғҲгғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
```

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒдёҖиҲ¬зҡ„гҒ«гҒҜгҖҒPythonгӮігғјгғүеҶ…гҒ§йқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒ®гҒҜйҒҝгҒ‘гӮӢгҒ№гҒҚгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮзү№гҒ«гҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгҒ«зӨәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«гҖҒйқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгӮӢгҒЁPythonгҒ®ж§Ӣж–Үи§ЈжһҗгҒҢеӨұж•—гҒ—гҖҒ`SyntaxError`гҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒқгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒйқһASCIIж–Үеӯ—гӮ’еҗ«гӮҖгӮігғЎгғігғҲгӮ„гғүгӮӯгғҘгғЎгғігғҶгғјгӮ·гғ§гғіж–Үеӯ—еҲ—д»ҘеӨ–гҒ®йғЁеҲҶгҒҜгҖҒASCIIж–Үеӯ—гҒ гҒ‘гӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«гҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ
# ====================== END OF: src\sandbox_logs\repair_20250713_142329_fixed.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: src\file_creator.py ====================
# src/file_creator.py
import os

def create_code_file(filename: str, code: str, folder: str = "src/generated") -> str:
    os.makedirs(folder, exist_ok=True)
    path = os.path.join(folder, filename)
    with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(code)
    return path

# ====================== END OF: src\file_creator.py ======================

гӮЁгғ©гғјгғЎгғғгӮ»гғјгӮёгӮ’иҰӢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгғўгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гҒ®гӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгҒ«еӨұж•—гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜPythonгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒ«е•ҸйЎҢгҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶгӮҲгӮҠгҒҜгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲз’°еўғгҒ®иЁӯе®ҡгӮ„гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®й…ҚзҪ®гҒ«е•ҸйЎҢгҒҢгҒӮгӮӢеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢй«ҳгҒ„гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгғҰгғјгӮ¶гғјгҒҢжҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҹгӮігғјгғүгҒ®дёӯгҒ«гҒҜгҖҒзўәгҒӢгҒ«й–“йҒ•гҒ„гҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҒҢгҖҒгҒқгӮҢгҒҢгҒ“гҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒ®еҺҹеӣ гҒ§гҒҜгҒӘгҒ„гӮҲгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

гҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒгғҰгғјгӮ¶гғјгҒҢжҢҮж‘ҳгҒ—гҒҹйҖҡгӮҠгҖҒй–ўж•°addгҒ®дёӯгҒ®жј”з®—гҒҢй–“йҒ•гҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжӯЈгҒ—гҒҸгҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«гҒӘгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

def add(a, b):
    return a + b  # Corrected from subtraction to addition

def test_add():
    assert add(1, 2) == 3
    assert add(-1, 1) == 0
    assert add(0, 0) == 0
```

def add(a, b):

# ==================== START OF: fix_imports.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«еҗҚ: fix_imports.py
# гғЎгғў: NexusCore гӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгғ‘гӮ№дҝ®жӯЈгғ»гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲж§ӢйҖ жӨңиЁјгғ„гғјгғ«
#
# ж©ҹиғҪ:
# 1. гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲеҶ…гҒ®Pythonгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®гӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгғ‘гӮ№гӮ’зө¶еҜҫгғ‘гӮ№гҒ«дҝ®жӯЈ
# 2. дёҚи¶ігҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢ __init__.py гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гӮ’иҮӘеӢ•з”ҹжҲҗ
# 3. гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®еҹәжң¬ж§ӢйҖ гӮ’жӨңиЁј
#
# дҪҝгҒ„ж–№:
# гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®гғ«гғјгғҲгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘгҒ§д»ҘдёӢгҒ®гӮігғһгғігғүгӮ’е®ҹиЎҢ
# python fix_imports.py
#
# зү№е®ҡгҒ®гғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘгӮ’еҜҫиұЎгҒ«гҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲ:
# python fix_imports.py --directory src
#
# еӨүжӣҙгӮ’е®ҹйҡӣгҒ«иЎҢгӮҸгҒҡгҒ«гҖҒдҝ®жӯЈеҜҫиұЎгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гӮ’зўәиӘҚгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲ (Dry Run):
# python fix_imports.py --dry-run
# ==============================================================================

import os
import re
import argparse
from pathlib import Path

def fix_import_paths(root_dir: str, dry_run: bool = False):
    """
    жҢҮе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘеҶ…гҒ®Pythonгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®гӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгғ‘гӮ№гӮ’дҝ®жӯЈгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

    Args:
        root_dir (str): дҝ®жӯЈеҜҫиұЎгҒ®гғ«гғјгғҲгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘгҖӮ
        dry_run (bool): TrueгҒ®е ҙеҗҲгҖҒгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®еӨүжӣҙгҒҜиЎҢгӮҸгҒҡгҖҒдҝ®жӯЈеҜҫиұЎгӮ’иЎЁзӨәгҒҷгӮӢгҒ гҒ‘гҖӮ
    """
    print(f"рҹ”Қ '{root_dir}' гғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘгҒ®гӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгғ‘гӮ№гӮ’гӮ№гӮӯгғЈгғідёӯ...")
    if dry_run:
        print("вҡ пёҸ гғүгғ©гӮӨгғ©гғігғўгғјгғү: гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®еӨүжӣҙгҒҜиЎҢгӮҸгӮҢгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ")

    # еҚҳиӘһеўғз•Ң(\b)гӮ’иҝҪеҠ гҒ—гҖҒгӮҲгӮҠжӯЈзўәгҒӘгғһгғғгғҒгғігӮ°гӮ’иЎҢгҒҶгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«жӯЈиҰҸиЎЁзҸҫгӮ’ж”№е–„
    # гҒ“гӮҢгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒ'my_agents' гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘйЎһдјјеҗҚгӮ’жҢҒгҒӨз„Ўй–ўдҝӮгҒӘгғўгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гҒёгҒ®иӘӨгғһгғғгғҒгӮ’йҳІгҒҺгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
    patterns = [
        (r'from \bagents\b', 'from nexuscore.agents'),
        (r'from \bcore\b', 'from nexuscore.core'),
        (r'from \butils\b', 'from nexuscore.utils'),
        (r'from \bmodules\b', 'from nexuscore.modules'),
        (r'from \bapi\b', 'from nexuscore.api'),
        (r'from \baudio\b', 'from nexuscore.audio'),
        (r'from \bcode_interpreter\b', 'from nexuscore.code_interpreter'),
        (r'from \bgradio_app\b', 'from nexuscore.gradio_app'),
        # зӣёеҜҫгӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгҒ®дҝ®жӯЈ (дҫӢ: from .agents -> from nexuscore.agents)
        (r'from \.(agents|core|utils|modules|api|audio|code_interpreter|gradio_app)', r'from nexuscore.\1')
    ]

    fixed_count = 0
    changed_files = []
    root_path = Path(root_dir)

    if not root_path.is_dir():
        print(f"вқҢ гӮЁгғ©гғј: гғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘ '{root_dir}' гҒҢиҰӢгҒӨгҒӢгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ")
        print(f"зҸҫеңЁгҒ®дҪңжҘӯгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘ: {Path.cwd()}")
        return

    for py_file in root_path.rglob("*.py"):
        try:
            content = py_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
            original_content = content
            
            for old_pattern, new_pattern in patterns:
                content = re.sub(old_pattern, new_pattern, content)

            if content != original_content:
                changed_files.append(py_file)
                if not dry_run:
                    py_file.write_text(content, encoding='utf-8')
                fixed_count += 1
                
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"вқҢ '{py_file}' гҒ®еҮҰзҗҶдёӯгҒ«гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹ: {e}")

    if changed_files:
        print("\n--- дҝ®жӯЈеҜҫиұЎгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ« ---")
        current_dir = Path.cwd()
        for f in changed_files:
            # вҳ…вҳ…вҳ… гӮЁгғ©гғјдҝ®жӯЈ: е®үе…ЁгҒӘзӣёеҜҫгғ‘гӮ№иЁҲз®— вҳ…вҳ…вҳ…
            # relative_to() гҒҢеӨұж•—гҒҷгӮӢгӮЁгғғгӮёгӮұгғјгӮ№ (дҫӢ: гғүгғ©гӮӨгғ–гҒҢз•°гҒӘгӮӢ) гӮ’иҖғж…®гҒ—гҖҒ
            # дҫӢеӨ–еҮҰзҗҶгӮ’иҝҪеҠ гҒ—гҒҰе …зүўжҖ§гӮ’й«ҳгӮҒгӮӢгҖӮ
            try:
                display_path = f.relative_to(current_dir)
            except ValueError:
                # гғ‘гӮ№иЁҲз®—гҒ«еӨұж•—гҒ—гҒҹе ҙеҗҲгҒҜгҖҒгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гғ‘гӮ№гӮ’гҒқгҒ®гҒҫгҒҫиЎЁзӨәгҒҷгӮӢ
                display_path = f
            print(f"  - {display_path}")
        print("--------------------")

    if dry_run:
        print(f"\nвң… гӮ№гӮӯгғЈгғіе®ҢдәҶ: {fixed_count} еҖӢгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒҢдҝ®жӯЈеҜҫиұЎгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ")
    else:
        print(f"\nвң… дҝ®жӯЈе®ҢдәҶ: {fixed_count} еҖӢгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®гӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгғ‘гӮ№гӮ’дҝ®жӯЈгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ")


def create_missing_init_files(dry_run: bool = False):
    """
    гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲеҶ…гҒ®йҮҚиҰҒгҒӘгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘгҒ«дёҚи¶ігҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢ__init__.pyгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гӮ’дҪңжҲҗгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
    """
    print("\nрҹ”Қ __init__.py гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гӮ’гғҒгӮ§гғғгӮҜдёӯ...")
    if dry_run:
        print("вҡ пёҸ гғүгғ©гӮӨгғ©гғігғўгғјгғү: гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®дҪңжҲҗгҒҜиЎҢгӮҸгӮҢгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ")

    # гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®гғ‘гғғгӮұгғјгӮёгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰиӘҚиӯҳгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢгҒ№гҒҚйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘ
    important_dirs = [
        "src/nexuscore",
        "src/nexuscore/agents",
        "src/nexuscore/core",
        "src/nexuscore/utils",
        "src/nexuscore/modules",
        "src/nexuscore/api",
        "src/nexuscore/audio",
        "src/nexuscore/code_interpreter",
        "src/nexuscore/gradio_app",
        "tests",
        "tests/unit",
        "tests/integration",
    ]
    
    # srcгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘиҮӘдҪ“гӮӮгғ‘гғғгӮұгғјгӮёгғ«гғјгғҲгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰгғһгғјгӮҜ
    if Path("src").is_dir():
        important_dirs.insert(0, "src")

    created_count = 0
    for dir_path_str in important_dirs:
        dir_path = Path(dir_path_str)
        if not dir_path.is_dir():
            continue

        init_file = dir_path / "__init__.py"
        if not init_file.exists():
            print(f"рҹ“„ дҪңжҲҗеҜҫиұЎ: {init_file}")
            if not dry_run:
                init_file.write_text("# This file makes this a Python package\n", encoding='utf-8')
            created_count += 1
        else:
            # ж—ўеӯҳгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒҜгӮ№гӮӯгғғгғ—
            pass
            
    if created_count > 0:
        if dry_run:
            print(f"\nвң… гғҒгӮ§гғғгӮҜе®ҢдәҶ: {created_count} еҖӢгҒ® __init__.py гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒҢдҪңжҲҗеҜҫиұЎгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ")
        else:
            print(f"\nвң… дҪңжҲҗе®ҢдәҶ: {created_count} еҖӢгҒ® __init__.py гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гӮ’ж–°иҰҸдҪңжҲҗгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ")
    else:
        print("вң… гҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®йҮҚиҰҒгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘгҒ« __init__.py гҒҜеӯҳеңЁгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ")


def verify_structure():
    """
    гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®еҹәжң¬зҡ„гҒӘгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«ж§ӢйҖ гҒҢжңҹеҫ…йҖҡгӮҠгҒӢгӮ’зўәиӘҚгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
    """
    print("\nрҹ“Ҡ гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲж§ӢйҖ гҒ®жӨңиЁј:")
    print("="*50)

    key_elements = [
        "src/nexuscore",
        "src/nexuscore/__init__.py",
        "pyproject.toml",
        "tests",
    ]

    for element_path in key_elements:
        path = Path(element_path)
        status = "вң… еӯҳеңЁгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷ" if path.exists() else "вқҢ иҰӢгҒӨгҒӢгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“"
        print(f"  - {element_path:<30} -> {status}")

    print("="*50)


def main():
    """
    гғЎгӮӨгғігҒ®е®ҹиЎҢй–ўж•°гҖӮгӮігғһгғігғүгғ©гӮӨгғіеј•ж•°гӮ’еҮҰзҗҶгҒ—гҖҒеҗ„ж©ҹиғҪгӮ’е‘јгҒіеҮәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
    """
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="NexusCore гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®гӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгғ‘гӮ№дҝ®жӯЈгҒЁж§ӢйҖ жӨңиЁјгӮ’иЎҢгҒҶгғ„гғјгғ«",
        formatter_class=argparse.RawTextHelpFormatter
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-d", "--directory",
        default="src",
        help="гӮ№гӮӯгғЈгғіеҜҫиұЎгҒ®гғ«гғјгғҲгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘ (гғҮгғ•гӮ©гғ«гғҲ: 'src')"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--dry-run",
        action="store_true",
        help="е®ҹйҡӣгҒ®еӨүжӣҙгӮ’иЎҢгӮҸгҒҡгҖҒдҝ®жӯЈгғ»дҪңжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгӮӢгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®дёҖиҰ§гӮ’иЎЁзӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--no-interactive",
        action="store_true",
        help="е®ҹиЎҢеүҚгҒ®зўәиӘҚгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгӮ’гӮ№гӮӯгғғгғ—гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ"
    )
    args = parser.parse_args()

    print("рҹҡҖ NexusCore гғЎгғігғҶгғҠгғігӮ№гғ„гғјгғ« рҹҡҖ")
    print("="*60)
    print(f"дҪңжҘӯгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘ: {Path.cwd()}")
    print(f"еҜҫиұЎгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘ: {args.directory}")
    if args.dry_run:
        print("гғўгғјгғү: вҡ пёҸ гғүгғ©гӮӨгғ©гғі (еӨүжӣҙгҒҜиЎҢгӮҸгӮҢгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“)")
    print("="*60)

    if not args.dry_run and not args.no_interactive:
        response = input("дёҠиЁҳгҒ®гғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘгҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰеӨүжӣҙеҮҰзҗҶгӮ’е®ҹиЎҢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҒӢпјҹ (y/N): ").lower()
        if response != 'y':
            print("рҹҡ« еҮҰзҗҶгӮ’дёӯж–ӯгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ")
            return

    # Step 1: ж§ӢйҖ гҒ®жӨңиЁј
    verify_structure()

    # Step 2: __init__.py гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®дҪңжҲҗ
    create_missing_init_files(dry_run=args.dry_run)

    # Step 3: гӮӨгғігғқгғјгғҲгғ‘гӮ№гҒ®дҝ®жӯЈ
    fix_import_paths(root_dir=args.directory, dry_run=args.dry_run)

    print("\nрҹҺү е…ЁгҒҰгҒ®еҮҰзҗҶгҒҢе®ҢдәҶгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ")
    if args.dry_run:
        print("гғүгғ©гӮӨгғ©гғігғўгғјгғүгҒ гҒЈгҒҹгҒҹгӮҒгҖҒе®ҹйҡӣгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«еӨүжӣҙгҒҜгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ")
        print("еӨүжӣҙгӮ’е®ҹиЎҢгҒҷгӮӢгҒ«гҒҜгҖҒ--dry-run гӮӘгғ—гӮ·гғ§гғігӮ’еӨ–гҒ—гҒҰеҶҚе®ҹиЎҢгҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ")
    else:
        print("\nрҹҺҜ ж¬ЎгҒ®гӮігғһгғігғүгҒ§гғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ’е®ҹиЎҢгҒ—гҖҒеӨүжӣҙеҶ…е®№гҒ«е•ҸйЎҢгҒҢгҒӘгҒ„гҒӢзўәиӘҚгҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„пјҡ")
        print("pytest --cov=src --cov-report=term-missing tests/")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# ====================== END OF: fix_imports.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: project_structure_and_code_export.py ====================
# гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«еҗҚ: project_structure_and_code_export.py
# зӣ®зҡ„: гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®ж§ӢйҖ гҒЁдё»иҰҒгҒӘгӮігғјгғүгӮ’еҲҶжһҗгҒ—гҖҒеҹәжң¬зҡ„гҒӘгӮЁгӮҜгӮ№гғқгғјгғҲгӮ’иЎҢгҒҶгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®гӮігӮўгғ„гғјгғ«гҖӮ
# дҝ®жӯЈеҶ…е®№:
# - LLMгҒҢиӘӨи§ЈгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„гӮҲгҒҶгҖҒPROJECT_INFO.mdгҒ®з”ҹжҲҗгғӯгӮёгғғгӮҜгӮ’ж”№е–„гҖӮ
# - гҖҢи§ЈжһҗеҜҫиұЎгҒ®жҰӮиҰҒгҖҚгҒЁгҖҢгҒ“гҒ®гғ‘гғғгӮұгғјгӮёгҒ®дҪңжҲҗж–№жі•гҖҚгӮ’жҳҺзўәгҒ«еҲҶйӣўгҖӮ
# - е…ғгҖ…гҒ®гӮ·гғігғ—гғ«гҒӘеҲҶжһҗгғӯгӮёгғғгӮҜгҒҜз¶ӯжҢҒгҖӮ

import os
import json
import zipfile
import fnmatch
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Dict, Tuple, Set, Any

# ===== гғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°иЁӯе®ҡ =====
MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB = 1
MAX_DEPTH = 10  # йҡҺеұӨгҒ®ж·ұгҒ•еҲ¶йҷҗгӮ’е°‘гҒ—з·©е’Ң
FILE_TYPES = ('.py', '.md', '.txt', 'package.json', '.json', '.yml', '.yaml', '.toml')
GITIGNORE_PATH = ".gitignore"

# ===== йҷӨеӨ–еҜҫиұЎпјҲеӣәе®ҡеҖӨпјү =====
DEFAULT_IGNORED_DIRS = {
    '.git', '.venv', '__pycache__', 'node_modules',
    'output', 'dist', 'build', 'sandbox_output', 'deploy_output',
    'myenv', 'openenv', 'exports', 'htmlcov', 'test_cache'
}
DEFAULT_IGNORED_FILES = {
    '.env', 'secrets.json', 'config.local.json', '.DS_Store', '*.log'
}

# ===== гғҰгғјгғҶгӮЈгғӘгғҶгӮЈй–ўж•° =====
def get_depth(path: str, base: str) -> int:
    return len(os.path.relpath(path, base).split(os.sep))

def load_gitignore(path: str = GITIGNORE_PATH) -> Tuple[Set[str], Set[str]]:
    ignored_dirs, ignored_files = set(), set()
    if not os.path.exists(path):
        return ignored_dirs, ignored_files
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for line in f:
            line = line.strip()
            if not line or line.startswith("#"):
                continue
            if line.endswith('/'):
                ignored_dirs.add(line.rstrip('/'))
            else:
                ignored_files.add(line)
    return ignored_dirs, ignored_files

def is_ignored(path: str, base_path: str, ignored_dirs: Set[str], ignored_files: Set[str]) -> bool:
    rel_path = os.path.relpath(path, base_path)
    parts = rel_path.split(os.sep)
    # гғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘгҒ®гғҒгӮ§гғғгӮҜ
    for i in range(len(parts)):
        sub_path = os.path.join(*parts[:i+1])
        if sub_path in ignored_dirs:
            return True
    # гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®гғҒгӮ§гғғгӮҜ
    for pattern in ignored_files:
        if fnmatch.fnmatch(parts[-1], pattern):
            return True
    return False

def create_folder_structure_json(
    directory: str,
    base_path: str,
    ignored_dirs: Set[str],
    ignored_files: Set[str]
) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    name = os.path.basename(directory)
    if is_ignored(directory, base_path, ignored_dirs, set()):
        return None
    
    structure = {"name": name, "type": "folder", "children": []}
    if get_depth(directory, base_path) > MAX_DEPTH:
        return structure

    try:
        for item in sorted(os.listdir(directory)):
            item_path = os.path.join(directory, item)
            if is_ignored(item_path, base_path, ignored_dirs, ignored_files):
                continue

            if os.path.isdir(item_path):
                child_structure = create_folder_structure_json(item_path, base_path, ignored_dirs, ignored_files)
                if child_structure:
                    structure["children"].append(child_structure)
            else:
                structure["children"].append({"name": item, "type": "file"})
    except OSError:
        pass
    return structure

def create_folder_structure_md(
    directory: str,
    prefix: str,
    base_path: str,
    ignored_dirs: Set[str],
    ignored_files: Set[str]
) -> List[str]:
    lines = []
    if get_depth(directory, base_path) > MAX_DEPTH:
        return lines
        
    items = sorted(os.listdir(directory))
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        item_path = os.path.join(directory, item)
        if is_ignored(item_path, base_path, ignored_dirs, ignored_files):
            continue

        is_last = i == (len(items) - 1)
        lines.append(prefix + ("в””в”Җв”Җ " if is_last else "в”ңв”Җв”Җ ") + item)
        
        if os.path.isdir(item_path):
            new_prefix = prefix + ("    " if is_last else "в”Ӯ   ")
            lines.extend(create_folder_structure_md(item_path, new_prefix, base_path, ignored_dirs, ignored_files))
    return lines

def combine_files(
    directory: str,
    ignored_dirs: Set[str],
    ignored_files: Set[str]
) -> str:
    combined_content = ""
    max_size = MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB * 1024 * 1024
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(directory):
        dirs[:] = [d for d in dirs if d not in ignored_dirs and not is_ignored(os.path.join(root, d), directory, ignored_dirs, set())]
        for file in files:
            file_path = os.path.join(root, file)
            if file.endswith(FILE_TYPES) and not is_ignored(file_path, directory, ignored_dirs, ignored_files):
                try:
                    if os.path.getsize(file_path) > max_size:
                        continue
                    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
                        content = f.read()
                    relative_path = os.path.relpath(file_path, directory)
                    combined_content += f"# === {relative_path.replace(os.sep, '/')} ===\n"
                    combined_content += content + "\n\n"
                except Exception:
                    pass
    return combined_content

# --- ж–°гҒ—гҒ„PROJECT_INFOз”ҹжҲҗй–ўж•° ---
def generate_project_info_content(project_path: str, ignored_dirs: Set[str], ignored_files: Set[str]) -> str:
    """
    гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®зөұиЁҲжғ…е ұгӮ’еҸҺйӣҶгҒ—гҖҒLLMеҗ‘гҒ‘гҒ®гғ¬гғқгғјгғҲгӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢгҖӮ
    """
    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
    total_files, total_lines, stats = 0, 0, {}

    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(project_path):
        dirs[:] = [d for d in dirs if d not in ignored_dirs]
        for file in files:
            if is_ignored(os.path.join(root, file), project_path, ignored_dirs, ignored_files):
                continue
            
            total_files += 1
            ext = os.path.splitext(file)[1] or "No Ext"
            stats.setdefault(ext, {"files": 0, "lines": 0})
            stats[ext]["files"] += 1
            try:
                with open(os.path.join(root, file), "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as f:
                    lines = len(f.readlines())
                    stats[ext]["lines"] += lines
                    total_lines += lines
            except Exception:
                pass

    # --- гӮ»гӮҜгӮ·гғ§гғі1: и§ЈжһҗеҜҫиұЎгғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®жҰӮиҰҒ ---
    project_summary = f"""# рҹ“Ұ NexusCore гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲи§Јжһҗгғ‘гғғгӮұгғјгӮё

## 1. и§ЈжһҗеҜҫиұЎгғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®жҰӮиҰҒ (`{os.path.basename(project_path)}`)

гҒ“гҒ®гғ‘гғғгӮұгғјгӮёгҒҜгҖҒгҖҢиҮӘе·ұйҖІеҢ–гҒҷгӮӢAIй–ӢзҷәгӮЁгӮігӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҖҚгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢ **NexusCore** гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®ж ёеҝғйғЁеҲҶгӮ’жҠҪеҮәгҒ—гҒҹгӮӮгҒ®гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

- **гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®зӣ®зҡ„:** е°Ӯй–Җзҡ„гҒӘеҪ№еүІгӮ’жҢҒгҒӨAIгӮЁгғјгӮёгӮ§гғігғҲзҫӨгҒҢеҚ”иӘҝгҒ—гҖҒеӨұж•—гҒӢгӮүеӯҰгҒігҖҒгҒқгҒ®ж•ҷиЁ“гӮ’зө„з№”е…ЁдҪ“гҒ®зҹҘиӯҳгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰи“„з©Қгғ»йҖІеҢ–гҒ•гҒӣгҒҰгҒ„гҒҸиҮӘе·ұйҖІеҢ–гҒҷгӮӢй–ӢзҷәгӮЁгӮігӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҖӮ
- **з·Ҹгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«ж•°:** {total_files}
- **з·ҸгӮігғјгғүиЎҢж•°:** {total_lines:,}иЎҢ
- **гӮЁгӮҜгӮ№гғқгғјгғҲж—ҘжҷӮ:** {timestamp}
"""

    # --- гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«зөұиЁҲгғҶгғјгғ–гғ«гҒ®з”ҹжҲҗ ---
    stats_table = "| жӢЎејөеӯҗ | гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«ж•° | гӮігғјгғүиЎҢж•° |\n|---|---|---|\n"
    sorted_stats = sorted(stats.items(), key=lambda item: item[1]['files'], reverse=True)
    for ext, data in sorted_stats:
        stats_table += f"| `{ext}` | {data['files']:,} | {data['lines']:,} |\n"
    stats_table += f"| **еҗҲиЁҲ** | **{total_files:,}** | **{total_lines:,}** |\n"
    
    # --- гӮ»гӮҜгӮ·гғ§гғі2: гҒ“гҒ®и§Јжһҗгғ‘гғғгӮұгғјгӮёгҒ®дҪңжҲҗж–№жі• ---
    package_info = f"""
---

## 2. гҒ“гҒ®и§Јжһҗгғ‘гғғгӮұгғјгӮёгҒ®дҪңжҲҗж–№жі•гҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰ

гҒ“гҒ®гғ‘гғғгӮұгғјгӮёгҒҜгҖҒ`project_structure_and_code_export.py` гғ„гғјгғ«гҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰз”ҹжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ
гҒ“гҒ®гғ„гғјгғ«гҒҜгҖҒ`.gitignore` гҒЁдәӢеүҚе®ҡзҫ©гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғ«гғјгғ«гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҚгҖҒгғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲеҶ…гҒ®й–ўйҖЈгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гӮ’жҠҪеҮәгҒ—гҖҒеҚҳдёҖгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ«зөҗеҗҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
"""

    return f"{project_summary}\n## рҹ“Ҡ гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«зөұиЁҲ\n{stats_table}{package_info}"


def main():
    PROJECT_PATH = "."
    OUTPUT_DIR = "exports"
    if not os.path.exists(OUTPUT_DIR):
        os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR)

    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    project_name = os.path.basename(os.getcwd())

    STRUCTURE_JSON = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"{project_name}_structure_{timestamp}.json")
    STRUCTURE_MD = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"{project_name}_structure_{timestamp}.md")
    COMBINED_CODE = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"{project_name}_combined_code_{timestamp}.py")
    PROJECT_INFO = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"{project_name}_PROJECT_INFO_{timestamp}.md")
    ARCHIVE_ZIP = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"{project_name}_bundle_{timestamp}.zip")

    print("рҹҡҖ .gitignoreгӮ’иӘӯгҒҝиҫјгҒҝдёӯ...")
    gitignore_dirs, gitignore_files = load_gitignore()
    IGNORED_DIRS = DEFAULT_IGNORED_DIRS.union(gitignore_dirs)
    IGNORED_FILES = DEFAULT_IGNORED_FILES.union(gitignore_files)

    print("рҹ“Ғ гғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘж§ӢйҖ гҒ®и§ЈжһҗгӮ’й–Ӣе§ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷ...")
    structure = create_folder_structure_json(PROJECT_PATH, PROJECT_PATH, IGNORED_DIRS, IGNORED_FILES)
    with open(STRUCTURE_JSON, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(structure, f, indent=4, ensure_ascii=False)
    print(f"вң… JSONеҮәеҠӣ: {STRUCTURE_JSON}")

    md_lines = create_folder_structure_md(PROJECT_PATH, "", PROJECT_PATH, IGNORED_DIRS, IGNORED_FILES)
    with open(STRUCTURE_MD, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write("\n".join(md_lines))
    print(f"вң… MarkdownеҮәеҠӣ: {STRUCTURE_MD}")

    print("рҹ“қ гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲжғ…е ұгӮ’з”ҹжҲҗдёӯ...")
    project_info_content = generate_project_info_content(PROJECT_PATH, IGNORED_DIRS, IGNORED_FILES)
    with open(PROJECT_INFO, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(project_info_content)
    print(f"вң… гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲжғ…е ұеҮәеҠӣ: {PROJECT_INFO}")

    print("вңҚпёҸ гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«еҶ…е®№гӮ’зөҗеҗҲдёӯ...")
    combined_content = combine_files(PROJECT_PATH, IGNORED_DIRS, IGNORED_FILES)
    with open(COMBINED_CODE, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(combined_content)
    print(f"вң… зөҗеҗҲгӮігғјгғүеҮәеҠӣ: {COMBINED_CODE}")

    print("рҹ“Ұ ZIPгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гӮ’дҪңжҲҗдёӯ...")
    with zipfile.ZipFile(ARCHIVE_ZIP, 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zf:
        zf.write(STRUCTURE_JSON, os.path.basename(STRUCTURE_JSON))
        zf.write(STRUCTURE_MD, os.path.basename(STRUCTURE_MD))
        zf.write(COMBINED_CODE, os.path.basename(COMBINED_CODE))
        zf.write(PROJECT_INFO, os.path.basename(PROJECT_INFO))
    print(f"рҹҺү е…ЁгҒҰгҒ®еҮҰзҗҶгҒҢе®ҢдәҶгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹ: {ARCHIVE_ZIP}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# ====================== END OF: project_structure_and_code_export.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: _extract_deps.py ====================
import sys, tomllib
from pathlib import Path

p = Path("pyproject.toml")
if not p.exists():
    print("[info] pyproject.toml: not found at repo root")
    sys.exit(0)

data = tomllib.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

def section(title, items):
    print(f"\n# {title}")
    if not items:
        print("(empty)")
    else:
        for x in sorted(items):
            print(x)

proj_deps = []
poetry_deps = []
opt_groups = {}

# PEP 621
proj_deps = list(data.get("project", {}).get("dependencies", []) or [])

# Poetry
for k, v in (data.get("tool", {}).get("poetry", {}).get("dependencies", {}) or {}).items():
    if k.lower() == "python":
        continue
    if isinstance(v, str):
        poetry_deps.append(f"{k} {v}")
    elif isinstance(v, dict):
        vers = v.get("version", "")
        extras = v.get("extras", [])
        poetry_deps.append(f"{k}{'['+','.join(extras)+']' if extras else ''} {vers}")

# optional-dependencies (PEP 621)
opt_groups = data.get("project", {}).get("optional-dependencies", {}) or {}

print(f"[info] Loaded: {p.resolve()}")
section("project.dependencies", proj_deps)
section("tool.poetry.dependencies", poetry_deps)
for grp, lst in opt_groups.items():
    section(f"optional-dependencies.{grp}", lst)

# ====================== END OF: _extract_deps.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: archive\ai_assistant.py ====================
# --- FILE: src/ai_assistant.py ---
# GPTгҒёгҒ®е•ҸгҒ„еҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒЁеҝңзӯ”и§ЈжһҗгӮ’жӢ…гҒҶгғўгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«
# ==============================================================================
import re
from openai import OpenAI

class AIAssistant:
    """AIгӮўгӮ·гӮ№гӮҝгғігғҲж©ҹиғҪгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒҷгӮӢгӮҜгғ©гӮ№"""
    def __init__(self, api_key: str):
        if not api_key:
            raise ValueError("OpenAI APIгӮӯгғјгҒҢиЁӯе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ")
        self.client = OpenAI(api_key=api_key)

    def _call_gpt(self, prompt: str, model: str = "gpt-4-turbo") -> str:
        """GPT APIгӮ’е‘јгҒіеҮәгҒҷгғ—гғ©гӮӨгғҷгғјгғҲгғЎгӮҪгғғгғү"""
        try:
            response = self.client.chat.completions.create(
                model=model,
                messages=[{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
                temperature=0.1,
            )
            return response.choices[0].message.content.strip()
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"GPT API Error: {e}")
            return f"APIгӮЁгғ©гғј: {e}"

    def _parse_response(self, text: str) -> dict:
        """GPTгҒ®еҝңзӯ”гӮ’гӮігғјгғүгҒЁиҰҒзҙ„гҒ«еҲҶеүІгҒҷгӮӢ"""
        code_match = re.search(r"```(?:python)?\n(.*?)```", text, re.DOTALL)
        code = code_match.group(1).strip() if code_match else ""
        
        summary_match = re.search(r"гҖҗдҝ®жӯЈзҗҶз”ұгғ»иҰҒзҙ„гҖ‘\n(.*?)(?:\n---|$)", text, re.DOTALL)
        summary = summary_match.group(1).strip() if summary_match else "иҰҒзҙ„гҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ"
        
        return {"code": code, "summary": summary}

    def generate_fix(self, target_file: str, current_code: str, test_code: str, test_results: str, user_instruction: str) -> dict:
        """
        гғҶгӮ№гғҲеӨұж•—гӮ’дҝ®жӯЈгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®гғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒ—гҖҒGPTгҒ«е•ҸгҒ„еҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгӮӢ
        """
        prompt = f"""
гҒӮгҒӘгҒҹгҒҜгҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒ®еӨұж•—гӮ’иҮӘеӢ•гҒ§дҝ®жӯЈгҒҷгӮӢгӮЁгӮӯгӮ№гғ‘гғјгғҲPythonй–ӢзҷәиҖ…гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ

гҖҗеүҚжҸҗгҖ‘
- дҝ®жӯЈеҜҫиұЎгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«: `{target_file}`
- гғҶгӮ№гғҲгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«: `test_sample.py`
- зӣҙиҝ‘гҒ®гғҶгӮ№гғҲе®ҹиЎҢзөҗжһң: 
```
{test_results}
```
- гғҰгғјгӮ¶гғјгҒӢгӮүгҒ®иҝҪеҠ жҢҮзӨә: {user_instruction if user_instruction else "зү№гҒ«гҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮгғҶгӮ№гғҲгҒҢйҖҡгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«дҝ®жӯЈгҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ"}

гҖҗзҸҫеңЁгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҖ‘
`{target_file}`:
```python
{current_code}
```test_sample.py`:
```python
{test_code}
```

гҖҗгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҖ‘
1.  дёҠиЁҳжғ…е ұгӮ’гӮӮгҒЁгҒ«гҖҒ`{target_file}` гҒ®дҝ®жӯЈзүҲгӮігғјгғүгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ
2.  дҝ®жӯЈеҶ…е®№гҒ®иҰҒзҙ„гҒЁгҖҒгҒӘгҒңгҒқгҒ®дҝ®жӯЈгҒҢеҝ…иҰҒгҒӢгӮ’з°ЎжҪ”гҒ«иӘ¬жҳҺгҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ
3.  еҮәеҠӣгҒҜгҖҒеҝ…гҒҡд»ҘдёӢгҒ®гҖҗеҮәеҠӣгғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғғгғҲгҖ‘гҒ«еҫ“гҒЈгҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮиӘ¬жҳҺж–ҮгҒЁгӮігғјгғүгҒҜеҺіеҜҶгҒ«еҲҶгҒ‘гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ

гҖҗеҮәеҠӣгғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғғгғҲгҖ‘
---
гҖҗдҝ®жӯЈзҗҶз”ұгғ»иҰҒзҙ„гҖ‘
гҒ“гҒ“гҒ«гҖҒдё»гҒӘдҝ®жӯЈзӮ№гҖҒдҝ®жӯЈгҒҢеҝ…иҰҒгҒӘзҗҶз”ұгҒӘгҒ©гӮ’з°ЎжҪ”гҒ«иЁҳиҝ°гҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ

---
гҖҗдҝ®жӯЈзүҲгӮігғјгғүгҖ‘
```python
гҒ“гҒ“гҒ«дҝ®жӯЈеҫҢгҒ®е®Ңе…ЁгҒӘPythonгӮігғјгғүгҒ®гҒҝгӮ’иЁҳиҝ°гҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ
```
---
"""
        response_text = self._call_gpt(prompt)
        return self._parse_response(response_text)


# ====================== END OF: archive\ai_assistant.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: archive\git_manager.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гғ•гӮ©гғ«гғҖ: src
# гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«еҗҚ: git_manager.py
# ==============================================================================
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
import git
import difflib

class GitManager:
    """GitгғӘгғқгӮёгғҲгғӘгҒ®ж“ҚдҪңгӮ’з®ЎзҗҶгҒҷгӮӢгӮҜгғ©гӮ№"""
    def __init__(self, repo_path: Path):
        self.repo_path = repo_path.resolve()
        try:
            self.repo = git.Repo(self.repo_path)
        except git.InvalidGitRepositoryError:
            raise ValueError(f"жҢҮе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғ‘гӮ№ '{self.repo_path}' гҒҜжңүеҠ№гҒӘGitгғӘгғқгӮёгғҲгғӘгҒ§гҒҜгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ")

    @staticmethod
    def initialize_repo(repo_path: Path):
        """ж–°гҒ—гҒ„GitгғӘгғқгӮёгғҲгғӘгӮ’еҲқжңҹеҢ–гҒҷгӮӢ"""
        git.Repo.init(repo_path)
        # в—ҖпёҸ гҒ“гҒ“гҒҢдҝ®жӯЈзӮ№пјҒ еҲқжңҹеҢ–еҫҢгҒ«иҮӘеҲҶиҮӘиә«гҒ®гӮӨгғігӮ№гӮҝгғігӮ№гӮ’иҝ”гҒҷ
        return GitManager(repo_path)

    def get_current_branch(self):
        """зҸҫеңЁгҒ®гғ–гғ©гғігғҒеҗҚгӮ’еҸ–еҫ—гҒҷгӮӢ"""
        return self.repo.active_branch.name

    def write_file_and_commit(self, file_path: str, content: str, message: str):
        """гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ«жӣёгҒҚиҫјгҒҝгҖҒгӮ№гғҶгғјгӮёгғігӮ°гҒ—гҖҒгӮігғҹгғғгғҲгҒҷгӮӢ"""
        full_path = self.repo_path / file_path
        
        full_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        with open(full_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(content)
        
        self.repo.index.add([file_path])
        self.repo.index.commit(message)

    def read_file(self, file_path: str, commit_hash: str = 'HEAD') -> str:
        """жҢҮе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮігғҹгғғгғҲгҒӢгӮүгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®еҶ…е®№гӮ’иӘӯгҒҝиҫјгӮҖ"""
        try:
            if commit_hash == 'HEAD':
                # HEADгҒ®е ҙеҗҲгҖҒдҪңжҘӯгғҮгӮЈгғ¬гӮҜгғҲгғӘгҒ®зҸҫеңЁгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гӮ’иӘӯгҒҝиҫјгӮҖ
                current_path = self.repo_path / file_path
                if current_path.exists():
                    return current_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
                return "" # гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒҢеӯҳеңЁгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„е ҙеҗҲгҒҜз©әж–Үеӯ—
            
            commit = self.repo.commit(commit_hash)
            blob = commit.tree / file_path
            return blob.data_stream.read().decode('utf-8')
        except (KeyError, git.exc.GitCommandError):
            return ""

    def get_history(self, limit: int = 20) -> list[dict]:
        """гӮігғҹгғғгғҲеұҘжӯҙгӮ’гғӘгӮ№гғҲгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеҸ–еҫ—гҒҷгӮӢ"""
        if not self.repo.head.is_valid(): # гӮігғҹгғғгғҲгҒҢгҒҫгҒ гҒӘгҒ„е ҙеҗҲ
            return []
        history = []
        for commit in self.repo.iter_commits(max_count=limit):
            history.append({
                "commit": commit.hexsha,
                "author": commit.author.name,
                "date": commit.committed_datetime.isoformat(),
                "message": commit.message.strip(),
            })
        return history
    
    def get_history_for_ui(self) -> pd.DataFrame:
        """GradioгҒ®DataFrameз”ЁгҒ«гӮігғҹгғғгғҲеұҘжӯҙгӮ’ж•ҙеҪўгҒҷгӮӢ"""
        history = self.get_history()
        if not history:
            return pd.DataFrame(columns=["commit", "author", "date", "message"])
        df = pd.DataFrame(history)
        df['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['date']).dt.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')
        df['message'] = df['message'].str.split('\n').str[0]
        # commit_shortгӮ«гғ©гғ гӮ’еүҠйҷӨгҒ—гҖҒcommitгӮ«гғ©гғ гӮ’7ж–Үеӯ—гҒ«еҲ¶йҷҗ
        df['commit'] = df['commit'].str[:7]
        df = df[['commit', 'author', 'date', 'message']]
        return df

    def get_tracked_files(self) -> list[str]:
        """гғӘгғқгӮёгғҲгғӘгҒ§иҝҪи·ЎгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ®дёҖиҰ§гӮ’еҸ–еҫ—гҒҷгӮӢ"""
        if not self.repo.head.is_valid():
            return []
        # 'git ls-files'гӮ’GitPythonзөҢз”ұгҒ§е®ҹиЎҢ
        return self.repo.git.ls_files().splitlines()

    def checkout(self, commit_or_branch: str):
        """жҢҮе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮігғҹгғғгғҲгҒҫгҒҹгҒҜгғ–гғ©гғігғҒгҒ«гғҒгӮ§гғғгӮҜгӮўгӮҰгғҲгҒҷгӮӢ"""
        self.repo.git.checkout(commit_or_branch)
        
    # --- write_fileгҒЁcommitгӮ’еҲҶйӣў ---
    def write_file(self, file_path: str, content: str):
        """гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒёгҒ®жӣёгҒҚиҫјгҒҝгҒ®гҒҝгӮ’иЎҢгҒҶ"""
        full_path = self.repo_path / file_path
        full_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        full_path.write_text(content, encoding='utf-8')

    def commit(self, message: str, add_all: bool = True):
        """еӨүжӣҙгӮ’гӮігғҹгғғгғҲгҒҷгӮӢ"""
        if add_all:
            self.repo.index.add(self.repo.untracked_files)
            self.repo.index.add([item.a_path for item in self.repo.index.diff(None)])
        self.repo.index.commit(message)
        
    def run_pytest(self, project_path: str) -> str:
        """гғӘгғқгӮёгғҲгғӘеҶ…гҒ§pytestгӮ’е®ҹиЎҢгҒҷгӮӢ"""
        try:
            result = subprocess.run(
                ["pytest"], cwd=project_path, capture_output=True,
                text=True, encoding="utf-8", timeout=30
            )
            output = "--- stdout ---\n" + (result.stdout or "пјҲгҒӘгҒ—пјү")
            if result.stderr:
                output += "\n\n--- stderr ---\n" + result.stderr
            return output
        except FileNotFoundError:
            return "вқҢ `pytest` гӮігғһгғігғүгҒҢиҰӢгҒӨгҒӢгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮгӮӨгғігӮ№гғҲгғјгғ«гҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒӢзўәиӘҚгҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„гҖӮ"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"вқҢ гғҶгӮ№гғҲе®ҹиЎҢдёӯгҒ«дәҲжңҹгҒӣгҒ¬гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒҢзҷәз”ҹгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹ: {e}"

def get_file_diff(old_content: str, new_content: str, filename: str) -> str:
    """2гҒӨгҒ®гғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒ®е·®еҲҶгӮ’HTMLеҪўејҸгҒ§з”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢ"""
    diff = difflib.unified_diff(
        old_content.splitlines(keepends=True),
        new_content.splitlines(keepends=True), fromfile=f"a/{filename}", tofile=f"b/{filename}"
    )
    html = '<div class="diff-container">'
    has_changes = False
    for line in diff:
        has_changes = True
        line_escaped = line.replace("&", "&amp;").replace("<", "&lt;").replace(">", "&gt;")
        if line.startswith('+'):
            html += f'<div class="diff-add">{line_escaped}</div>'
        elif line.startswith('-'):
            html += f'<div class="diff-remove">{line_escaped}</div>'
        elif line.startswith('@@'):
            html += f'<div><strong>{line_escaped}</strong></div>'
        else:
            html += f'<div>{line_escaped}</div>'
    html += '</div>'
    return html if has_changes else "еӨүжӣҙгҒҜгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮ"
# ====================== END OF: archive\git_manager.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: config\env_loader.py ====================
# src/nexuscore/config/env_loader.py
import os
from pathlib import Path
from dotenv import load_dotenv

def load_env_safe(env_path: str = ".env"):
    """
    е®үе…ЁгҒ« .env гӮ’иӘӯгҒҝиҫјгӮҖпјҲж”№иЎҢгғ»з©әзҷҪйҷӨеҺ»пјӢUTF-8еј·еҲ¶пјү
    """
    env_file = Path(env_path)

    if not env_file.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f".env file not found at {env_file.resolve()}")

    # UTF-8гҒ§иӘӯгҒҝиҫјгҒҝпјҲBOMйҷӨеҺ»гӮӮеҗ«гӮҖпјү
    with open(env_file, "r", encoding="utf-8-sig") as f:
        lines = f.readlines()

    cleaned_lines = []
    for line in lines:
        # ж”№иЎҢгӮ„еүҚеҫҢз©әзҷҪгӮ’йҷӨеҺ»
        stripped = line.strip()
        if stripped and not stripped.startswith("#"):
            cleaned_lines.append(stripped)

    # дёҖжҷӮгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«гҒ«жӣёгҒҚжҲ»гҒ—гҒҰ dotenv иӘӯгҒҝиҫјгҒҝ
    tmp_env_path = env_file.parent / ".env.cleaned"
    with open(tmp_env_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(cleaned_lines))

    load_dotenv(dotenv_path=tmp_env_path, override=True)

    # зўәиӘҚгғӯгӮ°
    for key in ["OPENAI_API_KEY", "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "GOOGLE_API_KEY"]:
        if key in os.environ:
            val = os.environ[key]
            print(f"[ENV] {key}: len={len(val)} head={val[:6]}... tail={val[-5:]}")
        else:
            print(f"[ENV] {key}: (not set)")

    # е®үе…ЁгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒдёҖжҷӮгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«еүҠйҷӨ
    try:
        tmp_env_path.unlink()
    except:
        pass

# ====================== END OF: config\env_loader.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: database\knowledge_base.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«еҗҚ: knowledge_base.py
# й…ҚзҪ®е ҙжүҖ: src/nexuscore/database/
# зӣ®зҡ„: PostgreSQLгӮ’дҪҝгҒ„гҖҒFKB(Failure Knowledge Base)гӮ’ж°ёз¶ҡеҢ–гҒҷгӮӢпјҲUPSERTеҜҫеҝңпјү
# гғҗгғјгӮёгғ§гғі: 3.0 (Production Ready, Backward Compatible)
# дә’жҸӣ: add_knowledge/find_solution гҒ®гӮ·гӮ°гғҚгғҒгғЈз¶ӯжҢҒ
# иҝ”еҚҙ: add_knowledge гҒҜ "created" | "updated" | "exists" | "failed" | "not_ready"
#       пјҲеҫ“жқҘ "created" | "exists" | "failed" гӮ’дёҠдҪҚдә’жҸӣпјү
# ==============================================================================
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import os
import json
import logging
import re
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any

from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, String, JSON, Integer, select
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
Base = declarative_base()


class KnowledgeEntry(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'knowledge_entries'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    error_signature = Column(String, nullable=False, unique=True, index=True)
    cause = Column(String)
    target = Column(String)          # дҫӢ: 'source_file' | 'test_file' | 'both'
    solution_pattern = Column(JSON)  # дҫӢ: {"action": "edit", "file": "...", ...}
    description = Column(String)


class KnowledgeBase:
    def __init__(self, db_url: Optional[str] = None):
        url = db_url or os.getenv("DATABASE_URL")
        if not url:
            logger.error("Database URL not found.")
            self._engine = None
            self._Session = None
            return

        try:
            self._engine = create_engine(
                url,
                pool_pre_ping=True,
                future=True,
            )
            self._Session = sessionmaker(bind=self._engine, autoflush=False, autocommit=False, expire_on_commit=False)

            # ж—ўеӯҳгӮ№гӮӯгғјгғһгӮ’з¶ӯжҢҒгҒ—гҒҰдҪңжҲҗ
            Base.metadata.create_all(self._engine)
            logger.info("вң… Successfully connected to PostgreSQL Knowledge Base.")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"вқҢ Could not connect to PostgreSQL: {e}", exc_info=True)
            self._engine = None
            self._Session = None

    # ---- гғҰгғјгғҶгӮЈгғӘгғҶгӮЈ ---------------------------------------------------------
    @staticmethod
    def _sanitize_entry(data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """
        дҪҷиЁҲгҒӘгӮӯгғјгҒҢжқҘгҒҰгӮӮејҫгҒҚгҖҒгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«йҒ©еҗҲгҒҷгӮӢdictгҒ гҒ‘гҒ«ж•ҙгҒҲгӮӢгҖӮ
        """
        allowed = {"error_signature", "cause", "target", "solution_pattern", "description"}
        clean = {k: v for k, v in (data or {}).items() if k in allowed}
        if not clean.get("error_signature"):
            raise ValueError("`error_signature` is required.")
        return clean

    @staticmethod
    def _equal_json(a: Any, b: Any) -> bool:
        """
        JSONзӣёеҪ“гҒ®жҜ”ијғпјҲиҫһжӣё/й…ҚеҲ—гҒ®й ҶдёҚеҗҢеҜҫзӯ–гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰгғҖгғігғ—жҜ”ијғпјүгҖӮ
        """
        try:
            return json.dumps(a, sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=False) == json.dumps(b, sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=False)
        except Exception:
            return a == b

    # ---- дә’жҸӣAPI: иҝҪеҠ /жӣҙж–°пјҲUPSERTпјү -------------------------------------------
    def add_knowledge(self, entry_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        """
        дә’жҸӣAPI: ж—§ "INSERT-only" гӮ’гҖҢUPSERTгҖҚгҒ«жӢЎејөгҖӮ
        жҲ»гӮҠеҖӨ:
          - "created": ж–°иҰҸдҪңжҲҗ
          - "updated": ж—ўеӯҳгғ¬гӮігғјгғүгӮ’жӣҙж–°
          - "exists" : ж—ўеӯҳгҒЁеҗҢдёҖеҶ…е®№гҒ®гҒҹгӮҒеӨүжӣҙгҒӘгҒ—пјҲдә’жҸӣгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒз¶ӯжҢҒпјү
          - "failed"  : дҫӢеӨ–
          - "not_ready": DBжңӘеҲқжңҹеҢ–
        """
        if not self._engine or not self._Session:
            return "not_ready"

        try:
            payload = self._sanitize_entry(entry_data)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Invalid entry_data: {e}")
            return "failed"

        session = self._Session()
        try:
            # 1) ж—ўеӯҳгӮ’жҺўзҙўпјҲunique: error_signatureпјү
            stmt = select(KnowledgeEntry).where(KnowledgeEntry.error_signature == payload["error_signature"])
            existing = session.execute(stmt).scalars().first()

            if existing is None:
                # 2) ж–°иҰҸдҪңжҲҗпјҲеҫ“жқҘдә’жҸӣпјү
                new_entry = KnowledgeEntry(**payload)
                session.add(new_entry)
                session.commit()
                logger.info(f"[KB] created: {payload['error_signature']}")
                return "created"

            # 3) е·®еҲҶеҲӨе®ҡпјҲе…Ёгғ•гӮЈгғјгғ«гғүпјү
            changed = False
            if payload.get("cause") is not None and existing.cause != payload.get("cause"):
                existing.cause = payload.get("cause")
                changed = True
            if payload.get("target") is not None and existing.target != payload.get("target"):
                existing.target = payload.get("target")
                changed = True
            if "solution_pattern" in payload and not self._equal_json(existing.solution_pattern, payload.get("solution_pattern")):
                existing.solution_pattern = payload.get("solution_pattern")
                changed = True
            if payload.get("description") is not None and existing.description != payload.get("description"):
                existing.description = payload.get("description")
                changed = True

            if changed:
                session.commit()
                logger.info(f"[KB] updated: {payload['error_signature']}")
                return "updated"
            else:
                logger.info(f"[KB] exists (no change): {payload['error_signature']}")
                return "exists"

        except IntegrityError:
            # з«¶еҗҲжҷӮгҒҜ exists гҒЁгҒҝгҒӘгҒҷпјҲINSERT raceзӯүпјү
            session.rollback()
            logger.info(f"[KB] exists (integrity): {payload.get('error_signature')}")
            return "exists"
        except Exception:
            session.rollback()
            logger.error("Failed to upsert knowledge", exc_info=True)
            return "failed"
        finally:
            session.close()

    # ---- жӨңзҙўAPIпјҲж—ўеӯҳдә’жҸӣпјү ----------------------------------------------------
    def find_solution(self, error_log: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """
        дә’жҸӣAPI: error_log гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒзҷ»йҢІжёҲгҒҝ error_signature (regexеҸҜ) гӮ’й Ҷж¬ЎгғһгғғгғҒгҖӮ
        д»¶ж•°гҒҢеў—гҒҲгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгҒҜеҲҘйҖ” index/гӮӯгғЈгғғгӮ·гғҘ/еүҚж–№дёҖиҮҙгҒ®е°Һе…ҘгӮ’жҺЁеҘЁгҖӮ
        """
        if not self._engine or not self._Session:
            return None

        session = self._Session()
        try:
            entries = session.query(KnowledgeEntry).all()
            for entry in entries:
                pattern = entry.error_signature
                try:
                    if re.search(pattern, error_log):
                        return {
                            "error_signature": entry.error_signature,
                            "cause": entry.cause,
                            "solution_pattern": entry.solution_pattern,
                            "description": entry.description,
                            "target": entry.target,
                        }
                except re.error as re_err:
                    logger.warning(f"Invalid regex in error_signature: {pattern} ({re_err})")
                    continue
            return None
        finally:
            session.close()


# гғўгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гӮ№гӮігғјгғ—гҒ®ж—ўе®ҡгӮӨгғігӮ№гӮҝгғігӮ№пјҲдә’жҸӣз¶ӯжҢҒпјү
knowledge_base = KnowledgeBase()
# ====================== END OF: database\knowledge_base.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: database\state_manager.py ====================
# ==============================================================================
# гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғ«еҗҚ: state_manager.py
# й…ҚзҪ®е ҙжүҖ: src/nexuscore/database/
# зӣ®зҡ„: RedisгӮ’дҪҝгҒ„гҖҒгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ®е®ҹиЎҢзҠ¶ж…ӢгҒӘгҒ©дёҖжҷӮзҡ„гҒӘжғ…е ұгӮ’з®ЎзҗҶгҒҷгӮӢ
# гғҗгғјгӮёгғ§гғі: 2.0 (Production Ready)
# ==============================================================================
import os
import json
import logging
import redis
from typing import Optional

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class StateManager:
    def __init__(self, redis_url: Optional[str] = None, strict: bool = False, namespace: Optional[str] = None):
        url = redis_url or os.getenv("REDIS_URL")
        if not url:
            msg = "Redis URL not found in environment variables."
            logger.error(msg)
            if strict:
                raise ValueError(msg)
            self._client = None
            self.is_ready = False
            return

        try:
            self._client = redis.from_url(
                url,
                decode_responses=True,
                socket_timeout=2.0,
                socket_connect_timeout=2.0,
                health_check_interval=30,
                retry_on_timeout=True,
            )
            self._client.ping()
            self.is_ready = True
            self.namespace = namespace or os.getenv("REDIS_NAMESPACE", "nexus")
            logger.info("вң… Successfully connected to Redis.")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error("вқҢ Could not connect to Redis", exc_info=True)
            self._client = None
            self.is_ready = False
            if strict:
                raise

    def _key(self, task_id: str) -> str:
        ns = getattr(self, "namespace", "nexus")
        return f"{ns}:task_state:{task_id}"

    def set_task_state(self, task_id: str, state: dict, ttl_seconds: int = 3600) -> bool:
        if not self._client:
            logger.warning("Redis client is not initialized; skip set_task_state")
            return False
        try:
            payload = json.dumps(state, default=str)
            key = self._key(task_id)
            self._client.set(key, payload, ex=ttl_seconds)
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Failed to set task state for {task_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
            return False

    def get_task_state(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[dict]:
        if not self._client:
            logger.warning("Redis client is not initialized; skip get_task_state")
            return None
        try:
            key = self._key(task_id)
            raw = self._client.get(key)
            return json.loads(raw) if raw else None
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Failed to get task state for {task_id}: {e}", exc_info=True)
            return None

state_manager = StateManager()
# ====================== END OF: database\state_manager.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: evaluation\evalplus\codegen\generate.py ====================
import os
from os import PathLike
from typing import List

from model import DecoderBase, make_model
from rich.progress import (
    BarColumn,
    MofNCompleteColumn,
    Progress,
    TextColumn,
    TimeElapsedColumn,
)


def construct_contract_prompt(prompt: str, contract_type: str, contract: str) -> str:
    if contract_type == "none":
        return prompt
    elif contract_type == "docstring":
        # embed within the docstring
        sep = ""
        if '"""' in prompt:
            sep = '"""'
        elif "'''" in prompt:
            sep = "'''"
        assert sep != ""
        l = prompt.split(sep)
        contract = "\n".join([x.split("#")[0] for x in contract.splitlines()])
        l[1] = (
            l[1] + contract + "\n" + " " * (len(contract) - len(contract.lstrip()) - 1)
        )
        return sep.join(l)
    elif contract_type == "code":
        # at the beginning of the function
        contract = "\n".join([x.split("#")[0] for x in contract.splitlines()])
        return prompt + contract


def codegen(
    workdir: PathLike,
    model: DecoderBase,
    dataset: str,
    greedy=False,
    n_samples=1,
    id_range=None,
    version="default",
    resume=True,
):
    with Progress(
        TextColumn(f"{dataset} вҖў" + "[progress.percentage]{task.percentage:>3.0f}%"),
        BarColumn(),
        MofNCompleteColumn(),
        TextColumn("вҖў"),
        TimeElapsedColumn(),
    ) as p:
        if dataset == "humaneval":
            from evalplus.data import get_human_eval_plus

            dataset = get_human_eval_plus(version=version)
        elif dataset == "mbpp":
            from evalplus.data import get_mbpp_plus

            dataset = get_mbpp_plus(version=version)

        for task_id, task in p.track(dataset.items()):
            if id_range is not None:
                id_num = int(task_id.split("/")[1])
                low, high = id_range
                if id_num < low or id_num >= high:
                    p.console.print(f"Skipping {task_id} as it is not in {id_range}")
                    continue

            p_name = task_id.replace("/", "_")
            os.makedirs(os.path.join(workdir, p_name), exist_ok=True)
            log = f"Codegen: {p_name} @ {model}"
            n_existing = 0
            if resume:
                # count existing .py files
                n_existing = len(
                    [
                        f
                        for f in os.listdir(os.path.join(workdir, p_name))
                        if f.endswith(".py")
                    ]
                )
                if n_existing > 0:
                    log += f" (resuming from {n_existing})"

            nsamples = n_samples - n_existing
            p.console.print(log)

            sidx = n_samples - nsamples
            while sidx < n_samples:
                outputs = model.codegen(
                    task["prompt"],
                    do_sample=not greedy,
                    num_samples=n_samples - sidx,
                )
                assert outputs, "No outputs from model!"
                for impl in outputs:
                    try:
                        with open(
                            os.path.join(workdir, p_name, f"{sidx}.py"),
                            "w",
                            encoding="utf-8",
                        ) as f:
                            if model.is_direct_completion():
                                f.write(task["prompt"] + impl)
                            else:
                                f.write(impl)
                    except UnicodeEncodeError:
                        continue
                    sidx += 1


def main(
    model: str,
    dataset: str,
    root: str,
    bs: int = 1,
    n_samples: int = 1,
    temperature: float = 0.0,
    resume: bool = True,
    greedy: bool = False,
    id_range: List = None,
    version: str = "default",
    backend: str = "vllm",
    base_url: str = None,
    tp: int = 1,
):
    assert dataset in ["humaneval", "mbpp"], f"Invalid dataset {dataset}"
    assert backend in ["vllm", "hf", "openai"]

    if greedy and (temperature != 0 or bs != 1 or n_samples != 1):
        temperature = 0
        bs = 1
        n_samples = 1
        print("Greedy decoding ON (--greedy): setting bs=1, n_samples=1, temperature=0")

    if id_range is not None:
        assert len(id_range) == 2, "id_range must be a list of length 2"
        assert id_range[0] < id_range[1], "id_range must be increasing"
        id_range = tuple(id_range)

    # Make project dir
    os.makedirs(root, exist_ok=True)
    # Make dataset dir
    os.makedirs(os.path.join(root, dataset), exist_ok=True)
    # Make dir for codes generated by each model
    model_runner = make_model(
        model=model,
        backend=backend,
        batch_size=bs,
        temperature=temperature,
        dataset=dataset,
        base_url=base_url,
        tp=tp,
    )
    identifier = model.replace("/", "--") + f"_{backend}_temp_{temperature}"
    workdir = os.path.join(root, dataset, identifier)
    os.makedirs(workdir, exist_ok=True)
    codegen(
        workdir=workdir,
        dataset=dataset,
        greedy=greedy,
        model=model_runner,
        n_samples=n_samples,
        resume=resume,
        id_range=id_range,
        version=version,
    )


if __name__ == "__main__":
    from fire import Fire

    Fire(main)

# ====================== END OF: evaluation\evalplus\codegen\generate.py ======================

# ==================== START OF: evaluation\evalplus\codegen\model.py ====================
import json
import os
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from typing import List
from warnings import warn

import openai

try:
    import anthropic

    from evalplus.gen.util import anthropic_request
except ImportError:
    warn("Anthropic decoder will not work. Fix by `pip install anthropic`")

# mistral.ai
try:
    from mistralai.client import MistralClient
    from mistralai.models.chat_completion import ChatMessage
except ImportError:
    warn("MistralAI decoder will not work. Fix by `pip install mistralai`")

import torch
from stop_sequencer import StopSequencer
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer

try:
    from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams
except ImportError:
    warn("VLLM decoder will not work. Fix by `pip install vllm`")

from evalplus.gen.util import openai_request

EOS = [
    "<|endoftext|>",
    "<|endofmask|>",
    "</s>",
    "\nif __name__",
    "\ndef main(",
    "\nprint(",
]


def extra_eos_for_direct_completion(dataset) -> List[str]:
    if dataset.lower() == "humaneval":
        return ["\ndef ", "\nclass ", "\nimport ", "\nfrom ", "\nassert "]
    elif dataset.lower() == "mbpp":
        return ['\n"""', "\nassert"]
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown dataset: {dataset}")


# some random words which serves as the splitter
_MAGIC_SPLITTER_ = "-[[]]-this-is-really-our-highest-priority-[[]]-"


def make_chat_prompt(prompt: str, tokenizer: AutoTokenizer) -> str:
    # directly return prompt if it does not have a tokenizer.chat_template
    if tokenizer.chat_template is None:
        return prompt

    prompt = f"""\
Please provide a self-contained Python script that solves the following problem in a markdown code block:
```
{prompt.strip()}
```
"""
    response = f"""\
Below is a Python script with a self-contained function that solves the problem and passes correpsonding tests:
```python
{_MAGIC_SPLITTER_}
```
"""
    prompt = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
        [
            {"role": "user", "content": prompt},
            {"role": "assistant", "content": response},
        ],
        tokenize=False,
    ).split(_MAGIC_SPLITTER_)[0]
    return prompt


class DecoderBase(ABC):
    def __init__(
        self,
        name: str,
        batch_size: int = 1,
        temperature: float = 0.8,
        max_new_tokens: int = 512,
        dtype: str = "bfloat16",  # default
        trust_remote_code: bool = False,
    ) -> None:
        print("Initializing a decoder model: {} ...".format(name))
        self.name = name
        self.batch_size = batch_size
        self.temperature = temperature
        self.eos = EOS
        self.skip_special_tokens = False
        self.max_new_tokens = max_new_tokens
        self.dtype = dtype
        self.trust_remote_code = trust_remote_code

    @abstractmethod
    def codegen(
        self, prompt: str, do_sample: bool = True, num_samples: int = 200
    ) -> List[str]:
        pass

    @abstractmethod
    def is_direct_completion(self) -> bool:
        pass

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return self.name

    def __str__(self) -> str:
        return self.name


class VllmDecoder(DecoderBase):
    def __init__(self, name: str, dataset: str, tp: int, **kwargs) -> None:
        super().__init__(name, **kwargs)

        kwargs = {
            "tensor_parallel_size": int(os.getenv("VLLM_N_GPUS", tp)),
            "dtype": self.dtype,
            "trust_remote_code": self.trust_remote_code,
        }

        self.tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(self.name)
        if self.tokenizer.chat_template is None:
            self.eos += extra_eos_for_direct_completion(dataset)
        self.llm = LLM(model=name, max_model_len=2048, **kwargs)

    def is_direct_completion(self) -> bool:
        return self.tokenizer.chat_template is None

    def codegen(
        self, prompt: str, do_sample: bool = True, num_samples: int = 200
    ) -> List[str]:
        if do_sample:
            assert self.temperature > 0, "Temperature must be greater than 0!"
        batch_size = min(self.batch_size, num_samples)

        vllm_outputs = self.llm.generate(
            [prompt] * batch_size,
            SamplingParams(
                temperature=self.temperature,
                max_tokens=self.max_new_tokens,
                top_p=0.95 if do_sample else 1.0,
                stop=self.eos,
            ),
            use_tqdm=False,
        )

        gen_strs = [x.outputs[0].text.replace("\t", "    ") for x in vllm_outputs]
        return gen_strs


class GeneralVllmDecoder(VllmDecoder):
    def __init__(self, name: str, **kwargs) -> None:
        super().__init__(name, **kwargs)
        self.eos += ["\n```\n"]
        print(f"EOS strings: {self.eos}")

    def codegen(
        self, prompt: str, do_sample: bool = True, num_samples: int = 200
    ) -> List[str]:
        prompt = make_chat_prompt(prompt, self.tokenizer)
        return VllmDecoder.codegen(self, prompt, do_sample, num_samples)


class HfTorchDecoder(DecoderBase):
    def __init__(self, name: str, dataset: str, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(name=name, **kwargs)
        self.device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

        kwargs = {}
        kwargs["device_map"] = "auto"
        kwargs["trust_remote_code"] = self.trust_remote_code
        # string to torch dtype
        kwargs["torch_dtype"] = getattr(torch, self.dtype)
        self.skip_special_tokens = True

        print(f"{kwargs = }")

        self.tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(name)
        if self.tokenizer.chat_template is None:
            self.eos += extra_eos_for_direct_completion(dataset)

        self.model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(name, **kwargs)
        self.model = self.model.to(self.device)

    def is_direct_completion(self) -> bool:
        return self.tokenizer.chat_template is not None

    @torch.inference_mode()
    def codegen(
        self, prompt: str, do_sample: bool = True, num_samples: int = 200
    ) -> List[str]:
        if self.temperature == 0:
            assert not do_sample
            assert num_samples == 1

        input_tokens = self.tokenizer.encode(prompt, return_tensors="pt").to(
            self.device
        )
        kwargs = {}
        if do_sample:
            kwargs["top_p"] = 0.95
            kwargs["temperature"] = self.temperature

        stop_sequencer = StopSequencer(
            self.model,
            model_type="causal",  # or seq2seq
            tokenizer=self.tokenizer,
        )

        model = stop_sequencer.register_stop_texts(
            stop_texts=self.eos,
            input_length=input_tokens.size(-1),
        )

        outputs = model.generate(
            input_tokens,
            max_new_tokens=self.max_new_tokens,
            do_sample=do_sample,
            num_return_sequences=min(self.batch_size, num_samples),
            pad_token_id=self.tokenizer.eos_token_id,
            **kwargs,
        )

        gen_strs = self.tokenizer.batch_decode(
            outputs[:, input_tokens.size(-1) :],
            skip_special_tokens=self.skip_special_tokens,
        )
        outputs = []
        # removes eos tokens.
        for output in gen_strs:
            min_index = 10000
            for eos in self.eos:
                if eos in output:
                    min_index = min(min_index, output.index(eos))
            outputs.append(output[:min_index].replace("\t", "    "))
        return outputs


class GenenralHfTorchDecoder(HfTorchDecoder):
    def __init__(self, name: str, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(name=name, **kwargs)
        self.eos += ["\n```\n"]
